title: Better Gold Recycling
description: Smelt larger gold items for ingots and smaller items for nuggets
body:
Recycle more gold items! With this data pack, you can recycle more gold-based items, such as clocks and powered rails, in a furnace or blast furnace for nuggets or even ingots!

If something requires four or more ingots per item to make, get one ingot from smelting it. Otherwise, get a gold nugget. Exception: Clocks become nuggets (so [download this data pack to make clocks use fewer ingots](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cheaper-clocks)).
